title: dactylorchis × beckeriana
intro: Dactylorchis × beckeriana, also known as the hybrid orchid, is a rare species resulting from the cross between the Dactylorhiza maculata and Coeloglossum viride plants. The medicinal properties of Dactylorchis × beckeriana lie in its ability to act as a vasodilator, helping to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat conditions such as hypertension, atherosclerosis, and even certain types of cancer due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Dactylorchis × beckeriana can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, often in combination with other plants to enhance its effects.
